title: IEDI Record v0.3
description: AMCP IEDI (Intent/Evidence/Delta/Insight) record schema. v0.3 removes work_domain (redundant with category system).

tool_called.description: Identifier for the tool or service invoked (e.g. coding_session, document_review)

requester_actor_id.description: DID or local ULID of the requesting actor

provider_actor_id.description: DID or local ULID of the providing actor. Equals requester_actor_id for internal use.

mode_used.description: Execution mode: autonomous (no human intervention), cooperative (human-in-the-loop), delegated (human-augmented execution).

intent.description: Pre-declared intent statement written before execution begins. Load-bearing: Delta is meaningless without a prior Intent.

evidence.description: Ordered list of execution log entries, MCP-event compatible

source.description: Origin of this evidence entry (e.g. cli, mcp_event, manual)

delta.description: Natural-language description of the diff between Intent and Evidence. Null while status=open. Model determines structure and granularity.

insight.description: Retrospective insights for future improvement. Null while status=open.

requester_prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 of the previous closed record in the requester's chain. Null for the first record.

provider_prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 of the previous closed record in the provider's chain. Equals requester_prev_record_hash for internal use.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 of this record via JCS (RFC 8785), excluding the record_hash field itself. Null while status=open.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the record was opened

closed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the record was closed. Null while status=open.
